title: AI Governance Navigator
public_claim: AI Governance Navigator is an AI-governance routing tool for moving from use case to risk, oversight, accountability, and assurance controls.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes a proposed AI use through policy questions, risk categories, oversight duties, assurance checks, and accountability decisions so governance becomes a sequence of choices rather than a slogan.
use_value: It matters because AI governance is useful only when a reader can see which control applies to which system, risk, actor, and decision point.

minimum_public_demo: Open or inspect the local runtime path for AI Governance Navigator Runtime Or Interface Surface; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
